isolation.notes: Electron app running with remote debugging on port 9222

results.evidence: Attempted to create COA with kode '11-11-001' (Excel GL Account format). Form validation rejected with 'Kode harus berupa angka' (Kode must be a number). Successfully created COA with numeric kode '9999' but Excel-format codes are rejected.
results.friction: UI form validation only accepts numeric values for Kode field

results.evidence: COA list page displays columns: No, Kode, Nama, Tipe, Parent COA, Status, Aksi. Data rows show correct information including parent hierarchy (e.g., '110 - Kas' with parent '100 - AKTIVA LANCAR'). Pagination works correctly (31 records across 2 pages).

frictions.description: COA Kode field only accepts numeric values, rejects Excel-format GL Account codes like '11-11-001'
frictions.impact: Cannot import COA data from Excel files that use hyphenated GL Account codes
